meta.title: Nobody's scared of Russia's nuclear-powered SKYFALL missile
meta.description:
Russia just announced a successful test of their nuclear-powered Skyfall cruise missile — a weapon that is no stranger to drawing headlines. 

Let's talk about why it's not something to lose sleep over. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
